title: Gibson Assembly Master Mix
description: NEB Gibson Assembly Master Mix (#E2611): kit components plus the 20 uL 50 C isothermal reaction for joining 2-6 overlapping fragments.

payload.body:
## Purpose

Join two or more overlapping DNA fragments into one construct in a single isothermal reaction, then transform into competent cells. Fragments share 15-25 bp end overlaps.

## Kit components

New England Biolabs Gibson Assembly Master Mix, #E2611. The 2X master mix combines three activities in a single buffer:

| Component | Role |
| --- | --- |
| Gibson Assembly Master Mix (2X) | Single tube combining the three enzymes below |
| 5' exonuclease | Creates single-stranded 3' overhangs so complementary fragment ends anneal |
| DNA polymerase | Fills in gaps within each annealed fragment |
| DNA ligase | Seals nicks, yielding a fully sealed double-stranded molecule |

The cloning kit format (#E5510) adds NEB 5-alpha competent cells. Supply your own purified, overlapping fragments.

## Reaction setup (20 uL)

| Component | 2-3 fragments | 4-6 fragments |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Gibson Assembly Master Mix (2X) | 10 uL | 10 uL |
| Total amount of fragments | 0.02-0.5 pmol (X uL) | 0.2-1.0 pmol (X uL) |
| Deionized water | 10 - X uL | 10 - X uL |
| Total volume | 20 uL | 20 uL |

When one or more fragments are shorter than 200 bp, use 0.2-1.0 pmol of that fragment.

## Steps

1. Assemble the reaction on ice in the volumes above. A positive control uses 10 uL of the supplied control DNA + 10 uL master mix.
2. Incubate in a thermocycler at 50 C: 15 min for 2-3 fragments; 15 to 60 min for 4-6 fragments (60 min recommended).
3. Place on ice. Store at -20 C if not transforming immediately.
4. Transform 2 uL of the assembled reaction into 50 uL of competent E. coli. Recover and plate on selective medium.

## Expected result

Colonies carrying the assembled construct. Screen by colony PCR or restriction digest and confirm by sequencing across the junctions.

## Notes

- Adjacent fragments must share 15-25 bp overlaps; design with the NEBuilder Assembly Tool.
- For assemblies of 4-6 fragments or any fragment < 200 bp, favor the higher input range and the 60 min incubation.
- Source (official): https://www.neb.com/en-us/products/e2611-gibson-assembly-master-mix (assembly protocol linked from the product page)
